mainEntity.name: What if I move from Boise to Murray during workers' comp claim?
mainEntity.text: What if I move from Boise to Murray during workers' comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jurisdiction follows injury state; benefits portable but treatment local.

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho claim stays in Idaho; Utah injury under Utah law. Coordinate carriers. Travel reimbursement possible; notify Commission.

name: Cross-State Moves During Work Injury Claims
description: Jurisdiction follows injury state; benefits portable but treatment local.
